info.title: Merchant API
info.description: The open-source commerce backend for Cloudflare + Stripe

delta.description: Positive to add, negative to subtract
Positive to add, negative to subtract

region_id.description: Optional region for this order. If not specified, uses default region.

post.description: Create initial API keys (only works if no keys exist)
Configure Stripe API keys for payment processing

get.description: List all inventory levels with pagination, or get a single SKU by query param

404.description: SKU not found (when querying single SKU)

post.description: Add or subtract inventory for a SKU with a reason

get.description: List inventory levels across warehouses with optional filters

post.description: Add or subtract inventory for a SKU at a specific warehouse

get.description: Get aggregated inventory for a SKU across all warehouses in a region

post.description: Replaces existing cart items with the provided items
Creates a Stripe checkout session and returns the URL

get.description: List orders with pagination and optional filters by status and email

post.description: Full or partial refund via Stripe
Creates an order without Stripe payment (for testing)

get.description: List customers with pagination and optional search
Get a paginated list of currencies
Get a paginated list of countries
Get all countries as a simple array (for bulk operations)

post.summary: Create multiple countries in one request
post.description: Batch create countries for better performance

get.description: Get a paginated list of warehouses ordered by priority
Get a paginated list of shipping rates
Get a paginated list of regions

post.summary: Add a country to a region
Add a warehouse to a region
Add a shipping rate to a region

404.description: Region or shipping rate not found

post.summary: Add a price to a shipping rate

404.description: Shipping rate or currency not found

post.summary: Retrieve an Auth0 Management API token
post.description: Calls Auth0 using the client_credentials grant, caches the result and returns the raw access token (for use by admin UIs).
Reads `AUTH0_AUTOMATIC_PERMISSIONS` and adds any missing values to the current Auth0 user via the Management API.

get.description: Returns detailed session and request info. Required permission: admin:store
